reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content: 알러지프리 먹였다가 저칼로리도 있길래 샀오요 우리 강쥐는 다이어트 해야 하지만 저칼로리라 좋아료!!! 맛있게 먹으면 영 칼로리!!!!!
reviews.content_en: I bought the allergy-free one, and then I saw they had a low-calorie version too, so I got that! My pup needs to diet, but since it's low-calorie, it's perfect!!! He eats it so well and it's low-cal!!!!!

reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content: 락토 프리 우유 구매해서 급여한 적은 몇번있는데 이렇게 애들 전용 우유는 처음 구매해서 먹여봐요. 그런데 예상했던것보다 냄새도 너무 달콤하고 애들이 잘 먹어요ㅜㅜ 이번 여름에 시원하게 챙겨줘야겠어요
reviews.content_en: I've given lactose-free milk a few times before, but this is the first time buying milk made specifically for pets. And honestly, the smell is so much sweeter than I expected, and the kids love it ㅜㅜ I'll definitely keep stocking up on this for the summer!

reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content: 육류 알러지가 있고 간식은 살이 쪄서 맘놓고 못줬는데 이건 칼로리도 부담 없고 알러지 프리라구 해서 맘 놓고 주는중이에요 먹을때마다 아그작 아그작 소리도 넘 귀엽고 펫밀크에 말아서 주는데 너무너무 잘먹어요 💗💗 재주문 할것같아요 !
reviews.content_en: My pup has a meat allergy and I couldn't give treats freely because of weight concerns, but this is low-calorie and allergy-free so I'm giving it without worry! Every time he eats it, the cute crunching sound is so adorable, and when I mix it with pet milk he eats it so well 💗💗 I think I'll be reordering!

reviews.name: 한****
reviews.content: 다이어트때문에 저칼로리와 포만감 느껴지는 간식 찾다가 이 시리얼 구매했어요! 배송 오자마자 달라고 손으로 보채길래 몇개 줬더니 바삭바삭 맛있게 씹어먹는 소리가 넘 귀여워요,.. 얼마나 맛있게 먹었는지 혀에 침 고였더라구요ㅋㅌㅋ 내일은 같이 산 우유랑 주려구요 완전 추천 무조건 재구매 할거예요😋😆
reviews.content_en: I was looking for a low-calorie treat with good satiety for his diet when I bought this cereal! As soon as it arrived, he was begging for it with his paws, so I gave him a few and the crunchy munching sound is so cute,.. He enjoyed it so much his tongue was hanging out lolol 😂 Tomorrow I'm gonna try giving it with the milk I bought too! Totally recommend, I'm definitely reordering! 😋😆

reviews.name: 민****
reviews.content: 요거요거 물건이에요. 우리집 작은 아이가 고기만 좋아하고 야채나 쌀과자는 잘 안먹거든요. 바잇미 크런치팝 오리지널 버전 제품도 큰 아이는 잘 먹는데 작은 아이는 가리고 안먹고 그래서 이 제품 살 때도 고민이 많았어요. 그래도 요거트니까 좀 먹지 않을까? 하고 속는 셈 치고 사봤는데.. 반전은 요거트(하얀색)보다 캐롭파우더가 들어간 사각형 과자를 더 좋아하네요. 이건 재고 따지는 거 없이 잘 먹어요. ㅎㅎ 크런치팝 오리지널 제품이나 요거트보다는 사각형 과자가 알갱이가 좀 크긴 한데, 굳이 쪼개어 주지 않아도 잘 부서저서 그런지 잘라달라고 하지 않아요. 저도 한 번 먹어보고 싶어요. ㅋㅋ
reviews.content_en: This is the real deal! My little one only likes meat and doesn't eat veggies or rice crackers well. My bigger pup eats the BITE ME Crunch Pop Original version fine, but the little one is picky and won't eat it, so I had a lot of doubts about buying this. But I thought, it's yogurt so maybe he'll eat some? So I bought it anyway... and the twist is he actually prefers the square carob-flavored crackers over the yogurt (white ones)! He eats these without being picky at all. Haha The square crackers in the Crunch Pop Original and yogurt version are a bit bigger, but they crumble easily even without breaking them up, so he doesn't ask me to cut them. I want to try one myself lol

reviews.name: 이****
reviews.content: 강아지가 너무 잘먹어요~ 크기도 강아지가 먹기에 딱 알맞아요~ 우유에 말아서 씨리얼처럼 줘도 잘먹고 단독으로 줘도 잘먹어요 사각사각 소리내면서 먹는거 보니까 다음번에 또 사줘야 될 것 같아요~ 쌀가루로 만든거라서 육류알러지 같은 거 신경안써도 되서 좋아요~
reviews.content_en: My pup loves it so much! The size is just right for dogs to eat~ He eats it well mixed in milk like cereal, and he also eats it well on its own~ The crunchy sounds he makes while eating are so cute that I'll definitely buy it again~ Since it's made from rice flour, I don't have to worry about things like meat allergies~

reviews.name: 지****
reviews.content:
애기가 눈물이 많아서 육류 간신은 되도록 피하고 있어요.
그래서 현미로 만들어진 시리얼을 구매했고, 너무 잘먹어줘서 이번에 추가로 또 구매했답니다 ㅎㅎㅎ
지인 강아지에게도 한봉지 줬는데 엄청 잘먹는다고 하더라고요~~
고기는 없지만 기호성은 좋은 간식은 것같아요!!
reviews.content_en: My pup has a lot of eye tears, so I try to avoid meat treats. So I bought this cereal made with brown rice, and he eats it so well that I bought more this time hehehe I also gave a bag to a friend's dog and they said he eats it really well~~ Even though there's no meat, it seems like a treat with great palatability!!

reviews.name: 임****
reviews.content: 패키지가 예쁘기도하고 강아지시리얼이라니 ㅠㅜ 너무귀여워서 사봤는데 울집멍이가 잘먹어줘서 더 기분이 좋았어요 ㅎㅎ 산양유에 말아주면 더 좋아하는 ㅎㅎㅎ 역시 뭘 아는 식멍뭉ㅋㅎ 다먹으면 또 사줄거에용>,<
reviews.content_en: The package is pretty too and dog cereal?? It's so cute I had to buy it, and I'm even happier because my pup eats it well hehe Mixed with goat milk he loves it even more hhh My knowledgeable little buddy knows quality lol I'll buy it again when he finishes it>,<

reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content:
바삭바삭 최애간식으로 픽! 
간식 여러개가 있으면 그 중 단연 일등은 크런치팝 시리얼이예요^^

아삭아삭 소리가 나서 그런지 엄청 잘 씹어 먹구요
우유에 타 먹이기도 하고^^

너무너무 맛있는지 정신없이 달라고 합니다. 
낮은칼로리로 많이 줘도 살찔까봐 덜 불안한것도 너무 좋구요^^
reviews.content_en: Crispy snack, my top pick! 🎉 Out of all the treats I have, the CRUNCH POP cereal is definitely number one ^^ The crunchy sounds make him chew really well, and I also mix it in milk^^ He loves it so much he keeps asking for more without thinking. It's also great that I can give him more without worrying about weight gain since it's low-calorie ^^

reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content: 우리 건인 펨브로크 월시코기이고 이제 한국나이로13세 노견입니다 작년부터 심장병 말기판정 받고 나서 계속 치료중인데 그중 하나가 살을 빼는겁니다 그리고 얼마전부터 턱관절이 안좋아서 더이상 딱딱한 것을 못 씹게되었어요 다이어트 하면서 너무 딱딱하거나 고기 베이스가 아닌 간식을 찾던 중 우연히 인스타에서 다른 코기엄마가 올린것을 보고 한번 사봤는데 건이가 좋아하고 씹기도 편하고작아서 보상간식으로아주 좋네요 앞으로도 계속.사려고 합니다
reviews.content_en: My pup is a Pembroke Welsh Corgi named Geon, and he's now 13 years old in Korean age and is a senior dog. Since last year he's been in advanced heart disease treatment and continuing treatment, one part of which is losing weight. And recently his jaw joint hasn't been good so he can't chew hard things anymore. While looking for treats that aren't too hard or meat-based while dieting, I happened to see another Corgi mom's post on Instagram and decided to try it. Geon likes it, it's easy to chew, it's small, so it's great as a reward treat. I plan to keep buying it going forward.

reviews.name: 권****
reviews.content:
지인선물로 먹여본후 기호성이 좋아 구매하게됐습니다

알러지프리여서 안심하고 먹일수있구,
신장결석이 있어 다른 간식은 제한하는데(칼슘,철분,단백질류?) 이건 안심하고 먹이는편입니다

노즈워크활동시 칼로리가 낮아 잘 이용중입니다

앞으로도 계속 구매예정이며 좋은상품 감사합니다~**
reviews.content_en:
I started purchasing this after my pet tried it as a gift and really liked it 😊

Since it's allergy-free, I can feed it with peace of mind. My pet has kidney stones so I have to restrict other treats (calcium, iron, protein?), but I feel comfortable giving this one.

I use it well during nose work activities since it's low in calories.

I plan to keep buying this in the future and thank you for such a great product!~**

reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content: 먹고나니 시리얼 하나가 얼굴에 딱~~ 붙어 있네요ㅋㅋㅋ 배고플때 먹으려고 붙여놓은건가? 귀여워서 몇 시간을 붙어있는 상태로 두었어요. 시리얼이 가벼워서 별로 느낌이 없었나봐요ㅋ 성분 보고 맛을 보니 우리가 먹는 뻥튀기에 단맛이 빠진 느낌! 토끼누나랑 같이 먹을 수 있는 간식이네요~~
reviews.content_en: After eating it, there's a cereal stuck right on its face~~ ㅋㅋㅋ Did you stick it there for when it gets hungry? It was so cute that I left it on for a few hours. Since the cereal is light, I guess it didn't feel heavy ㅋ After checking the ingredients and tasting it, it's like the puffed rice snacks we eat but without the sweetness! It's a treat that both my rabbit sister and I can enjoy~~

reviews.name: 안****
reviews.content: 강아지 시리얼 만들어보고 싶었는데 너무 복잡하고 시간도 오래걸리는거 같아서 포기했는데 바잇미에서 요로켕 이뿐 멈머 시리얼을 출시해서 구매를 해버렸는데! 너무 예쁘고 귀엽고 제가 먹어봫는데 겁나게 바삭하더군요! 멈머가 잘먹어서 다행쓰❤️❤️ 사랑해요 바잇미🎉🎉
reviews.content_en: I wanted to make dog cereal myself but it seemed too complicated and time-consuming so I gave up. But then BITE ME released this Momma cereal and I just had to buy it! It's so pretty and cute, and I tasted it too and it was super crispy! I'm so glad Momma ate it well ❤️❤️ Love you BITE ME 🎉🎉

reviews.name: 강****
reviews.content:
평소에 다이어트를 하고 있는 강아지에게 
간식이란 너무나도 소중한 존재인데 보통 
간식들은 5-6키로 개에게 한개 한개의반이 하루에 먹을수있는 양이 정해져있다. 하지만, 요 크런치한 수수깡같은 시리얼 과자는 패키지가 귀여울뿐만아니라 시리얼처럼 우유에 말아먹을수도있고 한알씩 보상간식으로도 훌륭하다💖
reviews.content_en: For a dog that's usually on a diet, treats are such a precious thing. Usually for treats, a 5-6kg dog can only eat half of one piece per day. But this crunchy, sorghum stick-like cereal snack not only has an adorable package, you can also soak it in milk like regular cereal and it's perfect as a reward treat given one piece at a time 💖

reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content:
알록달록 저희 율무가 너무 좋아해요
알러지프리라해서 믿고 먹여봐요
얼마전부터 여드름처럼 피부에 생겨서 걱정이거든요
식이 알러지인것 같다해서 사료도 바꿔주고있는데
먹여보고 괜찮음 너무 좋을듯해요
reviews.content_en:
Our Yulmu absolutely loves the colorful ones 🎨
I trusted and fed it since it's allergy-free.
She's had acne-like bumps on her skin recently so I was worried.
The vet said it seems like a food allergy, so I'm also changing her regular food.
If she's okay after eating this, it would be amazing!

reviews.name: 최****
reviews.content:
아 진짜 너무 긔엽잖아요- 
펫밀크랑 같이 딱 주면 아가들도 너무 좋아하구요
귀여운 색감하며…!
바잇미 이런거 왜케 잘만들어요??
reviews.content_en:
Oh it's really so adorable-
When I give it with pet milk, the babies really love it too
With such cute colors...!
Why does BITE ME make things like this so well??

reviews.name: 장****
reviews.content:
귀염뽀짝 시리얼이에요
하나만 사려고 하다가 받으면 만족도 높을 것 같아서 세 박스 한번에 샀고 풍이 무항생제 우유 한박스랑 같이 샀어요
우유에 말아주니까 너무 맛있게 먹어서 뿌듯합니다!
reviews.content_en:
It's an adorable cereal 🥰
I was just going to buy one but thought I'd be really satisfied when I got it, so I bought three boxes at once and got a box of Poong's antibiotic-free milk with it.
When I mix it with milk, they eat it so deliciously I'm so proud!

reviews.name: 최****
reviews.content:
강아지 시리얼이라길래 너무 신기해서 바로 구입해봤어요
강아지 유산균 또는 우유랑 줬더니 너무 잘 먹더라구요 만족합니다! 보기에도 너무 귀여워 재구매의사 있어요 ❤️
reviews.content_en:
I was so curious when I heard there was dog cereal so I bought it right away.
When I gave it with dog probiotics or milk, they ate it really well. I'm satisfied! It's also so cute to look at so I definitely plan to repurchase ❤️

reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content:
6개월 강아지 3개월부터 먹였습니다. 특별히 알러지 난적없고 성분도 괜찮은 것 같아서 이번 신제품 들어있는 패키지 구입했는데 포장도 참 예쁘네요 ^^
노즈워크 할때나 훈련용 트릿으로 사용 할때도 이만한 간식이 없어요 이번 새로 나온 크런치팝 쌀과자는 보기에도 예쁘고 바삭바삭 소리에 힐링되요 ^^ 잘먹으니 기분이 좋아요 가슴으로 낳아 지갑으로 키우는 이 마음 ㅋㅋㅋ
reviews.content_en:
I started feeding my 6-month-old dog this from 3 months old. There's never been any allergic reactions and the ingredients seem fine, so I bought the package that includes this new product. The packaging is really pretty too ^^
There's no better treat for nose work or training rewards. The newly released Crunch Pop rice cracker looks pretty and the crispy crunch sound is so satisfying ^^ I'm happy because they eat it well. Raising them with my heart and feeding them with my wallet ㅋㅋㅋ

reviews.name: 이****
reviews.content:
크런치팝 최애 간식 등극.
노즈워크에도 딱이고, 저열량에 맘마 토핑에도 최고.
단독으로 먹을 때 들리는 아작아작 소리에
기분까지 좋아져요>< 아무튼 최고라구요!❤️
reviews.content_en:
Crunch Pop has become my favorite treat.
It's perfect for nose work and with low calories plus momma topping, it's the best.
Just hearing the crunch crunch sound when eating it alone makes me feel good too >< Anyway it's the best! ❤️

reviews.content:
칭찬용 훈련용으로 매번 고기류나 과일류 간식을
주기가 부담스러웠는데 크런치팝 시리얼 출신된거보구
이거다 싶어서 주문해 봤어요
해비하지않은 성분들과 조리과정이 가장 마음에 들었고
너무너무예쁜 시리얼상자ㅠㅎㅎ완전 취저예요♡♡
저희애기 처음엔 뻥과자같은 느낌이여서 그런지
깨물지못하고 뱉고 다시 입에넣어보고
반복하더니 이젠 더 달라고 난리네요ㅎㅎ
reviews.content_en: I used to feel burdened giving meat or fruit treats for praise and training, but when I saw Crunch Pop cereal came out, I thought 'that's it!' and ordered it. I love the ingredients without any unnecessary additives and the cooking process, and the cereal box is SO pretty ㅠㅎㅎ I'm totally obsessed with it♡♡ At first, my baby couldn't bite it because it felt like puffed snacks, so she'd spit it out and try again, repeating this, but now she's demanding more ㅎㅎ

reviews.name: y****
reviews.content: 알러지프리라고 하길래 너무 귀여운 간식이라 구입해봤어요! 저번에 코코볼 봉지가 잘못닫혀서 흘럿는지 코코볼 먹을뻔해서 식겁했는데 그거보고 안쓰러워서 이거 사줫더니 제가 다 만족이예요 ㅋㅋㅋ ㅠㅠ 그리고 아삭아삭 식감도 재미있는지 좋아하드라구용~ 성분보고 정말 사람 갓난아기도 먹을정도로 괜찮은 성분이길래 저도 먹어봣는데 그냥 단맛 안나는 뻥튀기랑 비슷 ㅎㅎ
reviews.content_en: I bought it because it's allergy-free and such a cute treat! Last time a bag of Cocoballs wasn't sealed properly and spilled, and I got so scared thinking my pup almost ate them. Seeing that made me feel bad, so I bought this instead and now I'm totally satisfied ㅋㅋㅋ ㅠㅠ And she seems to enjoy the crispy texture! I even tried it myself after checking the ingredients - they're so good that even a human baby could eat them - and it's basically like puffed rice without sweetness ㅎㅎ

reviews.name: 가****
reviews.content:
정말 맛있게 먹어서 또 구매합니다~^^
우유랑 먹어도 잘먹고 그냥줘도 아주 잘먹어요~~ 바삭바삭 소리내면서~♡
reviews.content_en: My pup eats it so deliciously, so I'm buying it again~^^ She eats well with milk and also eats well with it alone~~ with all those crispy crunching sounds~♡

reviews.name: 홍****
reviews.content:
포장도 너무 귀엽고 우유랑 말아먹는 시리얼 개념이란것도 귀여워서 일단 사봤는데 울애기가 너무 잘먹어서 왕뿌듯❤️ 입맛이 은근 까다로운편이라 자기취향아닌거에는 확실한편인데 이거 너무 좋아해요 히히 빠삭빠삭한 식감때문에도 먹이는/먹는 재미도 있어욬ㅋㅋASMR 완전 쌉가넝. 처음에 뜯어봤을때 진짜 사람먹는 씨리얼처럼 생겨서 먹고싶은맘에 냄새맡아봤는데 방금 캔 흙묻은 채소냄새나욬ㅋㅋ
저희집강아지 과체중이라 간식을 평소에 거의 못먹이는데 얘는 그래도 저칼로리라 걱정없이 먹일 수 있어서 더 좋은거같아요! 
친구네 강아지 생일선물로 주기에도 포장지며 성분이며 다 너무 좋아서 하나 더 구매하려구요.
reviews.content_en: The packaging is so cute and the concept of cereal to mix with milk is adorable too, so I bought it on a whim, and my baby loves it so much - I'm so proud❤️ She has pretty picky taste usually and is very particular about things she doesn't like, but she absolutely loves this hihi The crispy texture makes it fun to feed/eat too ㅋㅋ The ASMR is totally amazing. When I first opened it, it literally looked like human cereal, so I got tempted to eat it and smelled it, and it smelled like freshly dug vegetables with dirt on them ㅋㅋ My dog is overweight so I usually can't give her many treats, but since this is low-calorie I can give it without worry, which makes it even better! I'm planning to buy one more as a birthday gift for my friend's dog because the packaging and ingredients are all so good.

reviews.name: 네****
reviews.content:
5키로 말티즈 흉통이 큰편이고 다리가 길쭉 길쭉한 아이입니다! 

사이즈는 상의는 L / 모자는 M 사이즈 구매했는데 딱 잘 맞습니다!! 

디자인 너무 귀엽고, 통기서 너무 좋고, 신축성도 쫜쫜하고 아주 좋습니다.

포차코 콜라보라고 해서 콜라보 전제품 구매해 버렸습니다 ... !

귀여운거옆에 귀여운거라니 이보다 좋은수가 없네요~~완전 베리굿 입니다요!!

5.6kg 둘찌 고양이에겐 좀 타이트 합니다!
물론 첫찌 멈뭉이가 입을거지만 제질이 좋아 고양이도 함께 입혀 보았습니다 ㅋㅋㅋ
reviews.content_en: My 5kg Maltese has a big chest and long, gangly legs! The size L for the shirt and M for the hat fit perfectly!! The design is so cute, the ventilation is amazing, and the elasticity is super stretchy and great. Since it was a Pororo collaboration, I ended up buying all the collab products...! Cute next to cute - you can't get better than this~~ It's totally great!! For my 5.6kg second cat it's a bit tight! Of course my first cat will wear it, but since the material is so good I tried putting it on the cat too ㅋㅋㅋ

reviews.name: 도****
reviews.content:
기름지고 쉽게 부스러기생기는 것도 아니라 노즈워크 담요에 넣기도 좋고 산책나갈 때 실리콘팩에 넣어 나가기도 좋아요 알러지프리에 저칼로리라 몸매 관리하는 친구들에게도 좋아요
시리얼이니까 우유에 강황가루 조금해서 줬는데 너무 맛나게 잘 묵어요 추천합니다 행사때 쟁이기 좋은 아이템이예요👍
reviews.content_en: It's not greasy and doesn't crumble easily, so it's great for putting in snuffle mats and also convenient to put in a silicone pouch when going on walks. It's allergy-free and low-calorie so it's good for friends watching their weight. Since it's cereal, I gave it with a little turmeric powder in milk and she ate it so deliciously. I recommend it! It's a great item to stock up on during sales👍

reviews.name: 별****
reviews.content:
알러지가 있어서 간식을 아무거나 못줘서 성분을 다 따져보고 선택합니다.
간식을 찾던중 눈에 띈 제품인데 알러지걱정없는 간식이라고 해서 구매했어요. 바삭바삭해서 씹을때 소리가 예뻐요. 색상도 이쁘지만 아이가 색깔까진 모를거 같네요^^ 
육류알러지있는 강아지에게 적합한 간식입니다
reviews.content_en: My dog has allergies so I can't just give any treats - I check all the ingredients carefully before choosing. I found this product while looking for treats, and since it said it was an allergy-free treat, I bought it. It's so crispy that it sounds pretty when chewing. The color is nice too, but I don't think my pup cares about that ^^ It's a suitable treat for dogs with meat allergies.

reviews.name: 박****
reviews.content:
크런치팝 완전 마음에 들어요🐾
색깔 별로 골라 먹는 재미도 있고, 크기도 적당하고
바삭한 식감 탕 이가 엄청 좋아라 하네요.

무엇보다도 포장이며 간식이 넘 귀엽잖아요 ..
영양제 먹을 때 같이 섞어 주니 환장 하고 먹네요!
탕 이는 대 만족입니다🙂

탕이는 알러지 걱정이 있어
이런 귀엽고 맛있는 저알러지•저칼로리 간식
아주 좋아요🎶
reviews.content_en: I absolutely love Crunch Pop🐾 There's fun in picking different colors, the size is just right, and Tang-yi loves the crispy texture so much. Most of all, the packaging and treat are so cute.. When I mix it with supplements, she goes crazy for it! Tang-yi is completely satisfied🙂 Since Tang-yi has allergy concerns, having such a cute and delicious low-allergy, low-calorie treat is amazing🎶

reviews.name: 이****
reviews.content: 패키지도 너무 귀엽구 색도 알록달록 너무 예쁘구 칼로리도 낮아서 애기 산책할때마다 주고있는데 너무너무 잘먹어서 대만족이에용 우연히 샀다가 너무 잘먹길래 3통 더 구매했어용ㅎㅎ 다 먹으면 또 쟁일거에요🤍!!
reviews.content_en: The packaging is so cute and the colors are so pretty and colorful, and the calorie count is low so I give it to baby every time we go for a walk - she eats it so well I'm super satisfied with it! I bought it by chance, she loved it so much I bought 3 more bottles ㅎㅎ I'll buy it again once we finish these🤍!!

reviews.name: 송****
reviews.content:
아직 울 댕댕이 먹여보진 않았지만 
크기가 작아서 칭찬간식으로 너무 좋을것같아요!!

사료를 질려해서 펫밀크에 시리얼처럼 말아줄려고 구매했어요
과자종류의 간식을 엄청 좋아해서 루이독에서 항상 사맥였는데 
바잇미 간식 너무 기대돼요!!!🥰

패키지 너무 귀여워요ㅠ 아빠가 사람꺼냐고 물어볼정도로 맛있게 생겼어욬ㅋㅋㅋㅋㅋㅋ울아빠 우유에 말아먹을뻔,,,,😂
reviews.content_en: I haven't tried it with my puppy yet, but the small size seems perfect for praise treats!! I bought it because she gets tired of regular food and I want to serve it like cereal in pet milk. She really loves snack-type treats and I always buy from Louie Dog, so I'm really looking forward to the BITE ME treats!!!🥰 The package is so cute ㅠ My dad even asked if it was human food because it looks so delicious ㅋㅋㅋㅋㅋㅋ My dad almost ate it mixed in milk,,,,😂

reviews.name: 신****
reviews.content: 알록달록 색감이 너무 예쁘구요. 식탐쟁이 2.9키로 뚱띵이 말티즈 슬개골 땜에 2.3~2.4까지 빼야 하는데 저칼로리에 부담없이 먹이기 너무 좋아요. 노즈워크 휴지말이에 넣어주니 환장하고 먹네요 ^^
reviews.content_en: The colors are so pretty and vibrant! My 2.9kg food-loving chubby Maltese needs to stay around 2.3-2.4kg because of patellar issues, and these low-calorie treats are perfect for guilt-free snacking. When I stuff them in a nose work tissue roll, he goes absolutely crazy for them ^^

reviews.name: 박****
reviews.content:
갓성비입니다 :-)
항상 산책다녀오고 우유에 시리얼을 뿌려주는데 아기가 좋아해요! 바삭바삭 먹는 소리가 너무 귀엽습니다🥹🥹
두 종류를 저렴하게 먹을 수 있어서 좋아요
노즈워크나 뿌려주고 놀아주면 신나합니다
살 많이 찌는 간식이 아니라서 다행이에욯ㅎ
reviews.content_en: Such great value for money :-)  We always go for walks and give her cereal sprinkled in milk, and the baby loves it! The crunchy sound when she eats is so cute 🥹🥹 It's nice being able to try two types affordably. She gets so excited when we use them for nose work games! I'm thankful it's not a treat that makes her gain a lot of weight either ㅎ

reviews.name: 태****
reviews.content:
이건 뭐 너무 귀여워서 구매했어요
우유를 좋아해서 우유만 사려다가
그냥 저도 시리얼 좋아해서
맛보게해주고 싶어서
처음 구매했어요
줄 때 귀여워요 알록달록해서ㅎㅎ
약간 낯설어해서 처음에 겉에 우유만 핥아 먹고
저한테 툭 떨구더라구요ㅎㅎ
그래서 우유 다시 톡 찍어서 먹으라고 하니까
먹어보더니 싹 비웠어요
reviews.content_en: I bought this just because it was so cute honestly. Since she loves milk, I was planning to just get the milk flavor, but I also like cereal so I wanted to let her taste it too, so I got it for the first time. It's cute when you give it to her with those pretty colorful pieces ㅎㅎ She was a bit unfamiliar with it at first and just licked the milk coating off, then dropped it back to me ㅎㅎ So I dipped it in milk again and encouraged her to eat, and once she tried it, she finished the whole thing!

reviews.name: 박****
reviews.content:
전에 한박스 구입해서 먹여보니 너무 좋아해서 이번에 할인하길래 9박스나 샀아요~
칼로리가 낮아 부담없이 주기 좋기도 하고 알록달록 예쁘기도 하고.울애기가 먹을때 씹는 소리도 엄청 귀엽고!!
건강한 간식 같아서 계속 사주려구요
한봉지 하루면 순삭이라 할인할때 더 사놔야할거 같아요~
reviews.content_en: I bought one box before and she loved it so much that when there was a sale this time, I bought 9 boxes! The calories are low so it's great to give without worry, and the colors are so pretty. The crunching sound when my baby eats is super cute too!! It feels like a healthy treat so I'm planning to keep buying it. She finishes a whole bag in a day, so I think I should buy more when there's a discount ~

reviews.name: 안****
reviews.content:
칼로리도 낮아 부담없이 주기 좋아서
크런치팝으로 빵 훈련을 시켰습니다!
동영상에서 후다닥 주느라 아주 살짝 보이긴 하지만 맛있는지 집중을 잘해줘서 이제 빵을 할수있는 개린이가 되었어요:)))
후일담으로 다른 제품도 사줬지만 이것만큼 열정적으로 먹질 않더라고요 ...하하
비슷해도 이게 제일 맛있나봐요~ 조만간 추가 구매예정입니다~
reviews.content_en: Since the calories are low and I can give them guilt-free, I used CRUNCH POP for training her to sit! You can barely see it in the videos because I'm giving them so quickly, but she concentrates really well since they're tasty, and now my puppy can do sit! As a follow-up, I bought other products for her too but she doesn't eat them as enthusiastically... haha It seems like this is the tastiest one even though they're similar ~ I'm planning to buy more soon ~

reviews.name: 이****
reviews.content:
크런치팝 1+1 하길래 냉끔샀어요
요새 살이쪄서 다욧해야하는데. . . 
다른간식보다 칼로리도 낮구 우선 아들이 넘 잘먹어요
택배 뜯자마자 자기껀지 아는지 냄새부터 맡구 ㅋ
넘 좋아요
reviews.content_en: I bought it on a whim because CRUNCH POP was doing a 1+1 deal. She's been gaining weight lately so I need to be careful... It has lower calories than other treats and most importantly, my boy eats it so well. He smells it as soon as the package is opened because he knows it's his ㅋ I really love it

reviews.name: 네****
reviews.content:
저희집 아가 간식~
키티박스가 귀엽고 알록달록 맛있어 보여서 구입했어요
제품마다 각 배송이 따로되어 당황스러웠지만…
강아지가 잘~먹어요! 바삭바삭 소리도 좋고 
함께 보내주신 간식도 너무너무 잘~먹어서 기분이 좋아요! 가격도 나쁘지 않고~ 조만간 또 사라 올께요!
reviews.content_en: My baby's snack ~ I bought it because the cute kitty box packaging and colorful treats looked so appetizing! I was a bit confused that each product was shipped separately... but my puppy eats it really well! The crunchy sound is great too, and she eats the extra treats you sent so well that it makes me happy! The price is reasonable too ~ I'll be ordering again soon!

reviews.name: 박****
reviews.content: 아기강아지 3개월 넘어가면서 간식에 입문했습니다! 알러지프리라 신뢰하고 구매했어요! 씨리얼 형태라 처음엔 잘 못먹더니 한통 금방 다먹고 재구매했습니다~ 소리도 바삭바삭하고 냄새도 너무 좋아요ㅋㅋㅋ 패키지도 너무 귀여워서 저까지 기분 좋아지는 간식이네요! 품절이던데 빨리 재입고됐으면 좋겠습니다!
reviews.content_en: Once my puppy turned over 3 months old, I introduced her to treats! I bought it trusting that it's allergy-free! It's in cereal form so she didn't eat it well at first, but she finished one container quickly and I reordered ~ The crunchy sound is great and it smells amazing ㅋㅋㅋ The packaging is so cute that even I'm in a good mood! It was out of stock but I hope it gets restocked soon!

reviews.name: 박****
reviews.content:
너무 귀여워서 리뷰를 안남길수가 없다..!
다이어트 중인 우리집 댕댕이를 위해 시리얼을 샀는데 처음에는 잘 안먹는 듯 하다가 오빠가 한입 먹어보니 맛있어서 와구와구 먹으니 동생도 따라서 와구와구 먹더라구요 ㅋㅋ
그런데 얼마나 열심히 먹었으면 털에 다 묻히고 먹는지도 모르고 냠냠 먹더라구요 ㅋㅋㅋㅋㅋ
많이 먹어도 칼로리가 적어서 다이어트 중인 댕댕이를 위해서 정말 좋은 간식 같아요 !!!!
이렇게 이쁜 간식 보신분 ..? ㅋㅋㅋㅋㅋㅋㅋㅋㅋ
reviews.content_en: I just have to leave a review because it's so cute..! I bought the cereal for my puppy who's on a diet, and at first she didn't seem interested, but when her older brother had a taste and found it delicious, she started munching away too ㅋㅋ And she was eating so enthusiastically that the pieces were getting all over her fur and she kept munching ㅋㅋㅋㅋㅋ Even though she eats a lot, the calories are so low that it's really a great treat for a puppy on a diet!!!! Have you ever seen treats this pretty..? ㅋㅋㅋㅋㅋㅋㅋㅋㅋ

reviews.name: 조****
reviews.content:
역시 믿고 사는 바잇미👍🏻
역시 믿고 먹이는 바잇미👍🏻
역시 믿고 입히는 바잇미👍🏻
역시 믿고 사용하는 바잇미👍🏻
신상이라고 해서 이번에도 또 충동적으로 왕창 구매했습니다. 
사고 나니 안먹는다는 후기가 있어서 불안했는데,
괜한 걱정이었습니다. 저희 아이는 너무 잘먹어요. 
크기도 작고, 많이 먹일 수 있어서
훈련용, 산책용, 노즈워크용 등등 만능으로 쓰입니다!!
스카우트북에 미니바이츠랑 같이 섞어서 주는데도
둘 다 잘먹어요! 마침 펫밀크도 잔뜩 구매했는데 같이 주면
딱이겠어요!!!! 유통기한도 엄청 넉넉하고, 양도 넉넉해서
주변 댕댕이 엄빠들에게도 같이 나눠먹자고 나눠줘야겠어요👍🏻
알러지 때문에 요즘은 미니바이츠-베지만 먹이는데
먹일 수 있는 간식이 하나 더 생겨서 너무 기뻐요😭😭
크기 대략적으로 궁금하실까봐 비교하시라고
손과 비교한 사진 하나 같이 첨부하니 참고해주세요😊
❤️만들어주셔서 너무 감사합니다, 바잇미❤️
reviews.content_en: BITE ME, always trust it 👍🏻 BITE ME, always trust feeding it 👍🏻 BITE ME, always trust wearing it 👍🏻 BITE ME, always trust using it 👍🏻 Since it's a new product, I impulse-bought a ton this time too. I was nervous after seeing reviews saying some dogs don't eat it, but my worries were unfounded. My baby eats them so well. The size is small and you can give a lot, so they're perfect for training, walks, nose work games, etc.!! I even mix them with Scout Book mini bites and she eats both well! I also bought a bunch of pet milk so pairing them together would be perfect!!!! The expiration date is super generous and the quantity is generous too, so I should share them with other dog parents around me 👍🏻 Due to allergies, I've been feeding only BITE ME Mini Bites - Veggie lately, so I'm so happy to have one more treat option I can give 😭😭 I included a comparison photo with my hand since you might be curious about the size, so please refer to that 😊 ❤️Thank you so much for making this, BITE ME ❤️

reviews.name: 이****
reviews.content:
크런치팝 첨 나왓을때부터 계속 주고있어요 평소 간식안먹이는데 유일허게 쉬야 응아 잘하켠 칭찬할때 얘 주거든요
그럼 씾어먹는 소리가 아주 찰지고 귀엽져 엣헴
얘 새로나왔대서 사봤는데
일단 그전 크런치팝이랑 다르게 향이 셉니다
그리고 네모난모양은 강쥐가 먹는디 시간이 걸려요
그래서 그전꺼처럼 쉬얒잘하면 3개씩 던져주는 용도륜 못쓰고 잔뜩 만지거나 뽀뽀하거나 개인기 시키고나서 보상으류 주기 좋네여 네모 쟤땜에 양은 아무래도 크런치팝 3/4인듯
다이소에서 산 밀폐용기 미니사이즈에 한봉지 다 들어가뎌 크런치팝은 두개나눠 담습당 키키 한번 사보고 쥬아서 6개 더구매했어요 키키 
풍이 우유는 작년에 블배로 구매했다 다시 여름이 다사와서 알크 믄들어주려고 오리지널 사써요
reviews.content_en: I've been giving CRUNCH POP since it first came out. I normally don't give treats, but this is the only one I use to reward when my pup does their business and pees well—the crunching sound when they eat it is so satisfying and cute! 😄 I bought the new version that just came out, and the flavor is definitely stronger than the previous CRUNCH POP. The square shape takes my dog longer to eat, so I can't use it the same way as before where I'd just toss 3 at a time for quick rewards. Instead, it's great for giving after they do tricks, touch, kisses, or show off their skills. The amount is probably about 3/4 of the regular CRUNCH POP because of the shape. One whole bag fits perfectly in a mini airtight container I bought from Daiso—I used to divide regular CRUNCH POP into two containers. I tried KIKI once and loved it, so I bought 6 more! I got the milk-flavored ones last year through Black Day sale, and now that summer's coming around again, I'm getting the original flavor to give them something cool.

reviews.name: 전****
reviews.content: 아삭아삭! 아그작아그작! 씹는 식감 좋아하는 아이들에게 안성맞춤!!❣️〰️❣️ 우리집 강쥐 과자 씹듯 아그작 씹는 걸 너무 조아라 하는데 그때마다 칼로리 높은 과자들을 줄 수도 없고 달라고 애교 부릴 땐 너무 난감해요!! ㅠㅠ 그럴 때 요 강아지 시리얼 하나씩 요깃거리로 주면 살 찔 염려도 없고 평소 야채 안 먹는 편식 강쥐한테도 너무 좋을 것 같네요 ㅎㅎ 스트레스 받지 않고, 다이어트 하는 강아지들 까까로 딱!!👍🏻👍🏻 펫밀크랑 같이 구매해서 세트로 줘도 한끼 뚝딱! 인데 칼로리는 사료보다 훨씬 부담 적고 ..! 애기가 너무 좋아해서 몇통 째 구매 완료..!!🏹〰️💝 다이어트하는 애기들 완전 강츄〰️〰️〰️‼️‼️
reviews.content_en: Crunch crunch! Munch munch! Perfect for pups who love that crunchy texture!! ❣️〰️❣️ My dog loves munching on treats like cereal, but I can't always give high-calorie snacks, and it's tough when they beg with their puppy eyes! ㅠㅠ With these dog cereals, I can give them treats without worrying about them gaining weight, and they're great for picky eaters who normally avoid veggies! ㅎㅎ Perfect for stress-free snacking and for dogs on a diet! 👍🏻👍🏻 I even buy them as a set with pet milk for a quick meal, and the calories are way lower than regular food! My baby loves them so much I'm on my nth pack already!! 🏹〰️💝 Absolutely perfect for pups on a diet! 〰️〰️〰️‼️‼️

reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content:
다이어트 중인 또야에게 한 줄기의 빛..✨ 같은 존재예요 ㅠ
야채로만 만들어지고 크기도 적당해서 산책할 때, 애견카페 갈 때 꼭 챙겨요 ! 색깔도 알록달록해서 예뻐요,, 예쁨까지 놓치지 않는 바잇미 .. 사자마자 급여해봤는데 너무 잘 먹어줘서 잘 샀다는 생각 500000번 했습니다 ,, 역시 바잇미 ㅠㅠ 어떻게 사는 것마다 다 만족할 수가 있져..? 별점 5개 모자라요 !!!! 500개 주고 싶어요 !! 그리고 옆에서 지켜보던 사람누나가 시리얼 냄새가 좋다며.. 맛있다며 자꾸 뺏어먹네요 ,, 저 사람누나가 다 먹기 전에 얼른 또 쟁여야겠어요 ❤️❤️
reviews.content_en: A ray of light for Ddoya who's on a diet.. ✨ That's what these are! ㅠ Made purely from veggies with a perfect size, I always pack them for walks and dog café visits! The colors are so pretty and colorful too.. BITE ME really doesn't miss anything, not even the looks.. I gave them right after buying and my pup ate them so well—I thought 'great purchase!' like 500,000 times! ㅠㅠ How can every product I buy from you be this satisfying? 5 stars isn't enough! I want to give 500 stars!! And my older sister was watching from the side saying the cereal smells good and tastes good, so she keeps stealing them from me.. I need to quickly stock up more before she eats them all! ❤️❤️

reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content: 아그작아그작 먹는소리가 넘넘 사랑스러우여~^^ 알러지반응없고 칼로리도 낮아 우유와함께 너무 잘 먹어서 재구매하려합니다~^^
reviews.content_en: The crunching munching sounds are so adorable~^^ No allergic reactions and low calories, my pup eats them so well with milk that I'm planning to repurchase! ^^

reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content: 요고요고 진짜 저희 애기들 최애 간식 식이알러지 심해서 항상 간식이 고민인데 우연히 오프라인 매장에서  귀여워서 사봤는데 너무 잘먹어서 놀랬습니다. 옛날에 첫째가 해당 상품과 비슷한 타사 제품을 구매한적이 있었는데 잘 안먹길래 버리고 그 뒤로이런 제품과 질감 상품은 손이잘 안게되더라구요. 근데 패키지가 귀여워서 구매해서 줬는데 너무 잘먹어 줘서 떨어지기 무섭게 재구매하고 있습니다 다음에는 왕창 살 예정입니당 무엇보다 asmr...쌉가능한 바삭바삭 ㅋㅋ 제가 하나 먹어봤는데.. 은근 맛있네여 히히^^
reviews.content_en: Yogo yogo these are my babies' absolute favorite treats! They have severe food allergies so treats are always a worry, but I happened to see these cute ones at an offline store and bought them—I was shocked how well they ate them! My first pup tried a similar product from another brand a long time ago but didn't eat it well, so I threw it out, and after that I wasn't confident about this type of treat texture anymore. But I bought these because the packaging was so cute, and they ate them so well I'm rebuying as soon as they run out! I'm planning to buy a ton next time. Plus the ASMR crunch factor is amazing.. ㅋㅋ I tried one myself and it's actually pretty tasty! ㅎㅎ^^

reviews.name: 나****
reviews.content: 강아지 간식이 뭐이렇게 귀엽나용....노즈워크로 해주는데 막 좋아하는거같진않아서 좀 아쉽지만 먹긴 먹어용!뭐든 잘먹는아기라서 ㅎㅎ하나주면 3분정도 먹어요 길어서! 냄새 별로 안나고 좋습니당 부스러기도 없구요! 양치를 하기 싫어하는데 열심히 시키고 있습니다 최근에 병원갔는데 치석제거 좀 되었다해서 열심히 시키려구용!
reviews.content_en: These dog treats are so cute though!! I use them for nose work but they don't seem super excited about it, which is a bit sad, but they do eat them! Since my pup eats anything, one treat lasts about 3 minutes because it's long! There's barely any smell and that's great, plus no crumbs! My pup hates brushing teeth but I'm working on it, and when I went to the vet recently they said some tartar came off, so I'm trying to do it more often!

reviews.name: 구****
reviews.content: 집에서 시리얼 만들어주다가 귀찮아져서 알아보다가 할인하길래 구매해봤어요~ 아이가 바삭바삭 씹으며 맛나게 먹네요 일단 내가 만든것보다 알록달록해서 이쁘네요 ㅎㅎ
reviews.content_en: I used to make cereal at home but got lazy, so I looked into this and bought it when it was on sale~ My pup eats it crunching happily! It's prettier and more colorful than what I made, which is nice ㅎㅎ

reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content:
박스부터 취향저격입니다!ㅋㅋ
박스디자인도 예쁘고 과자도 아삭아삭 오독오독 잘씹어먹네요
알러지프리라고해서 사보았는데 이정도면 만족해요:)
reviews.content_en: The box itself is perfect! ㅋㅋ The box design is pretty and the treats are super crunchy and chewy! I bought it because it said allergy-free, and I'm satisfied with this quality :)

reviews.name: 고****
reviews.content: 시리얼 4가지 맛으로 골라주는 재미도 있고 무엇보다도 갱쥐들이 잘 먹어서 좋아요!!😍 포장도 너무 귀욥.. 쌀가루로 만들어져서 부담없이 먹이기 좋은거 같아요 ~!!
reviews.content_en: Fun choosing from 4 different cereal flavors, and most importantly the pups eat them so well!! 😍 The packaging is so cute too.. Since it's made with rice flour it's great to give without worry! ~~

reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content:
앜 너무 기여워요~
우유에 말아서 촵촵촵~!
그냥 칭찬 간식으로 냠냠냠~!
요즘처럼 비 많이 오면 실내에서 노즈워크용으로 킁킁킁~!!
다양하게 너무 잘 먹이고있구요~
색감도 좋구 일단 알러지프리/저칼로리라서 넘 좋아요~
댕댕이들 먹는거보더니 울아들이 보더니 나도 우유에 시리얼 먹고싶다~그러네요ㅋ.ㅋ
reviews.content_en: So cute~! Soaked in milk and gulp gulp~! Just as praise treats and nom nom nom~! On rainy days like lately, I use them for indoor nose work and sniff sniff~!! I'm feeding them in so many different ways and they eat so well~! The colors look great too and most of all it's allergy-free/low-calorie so I love it~! When my pup eats these and my son watches, he says 'I want cereal with milk too~' ㅋ.ㅋ
